text: Verde is more expensive than Andino.
Verde is the most reliable supplier.
Verde is the best option for this client.
Fernanda, we have two coffee suppliers for the new order. Can you compare the two options?
Of course. Andino is cheaper, so the price is lower. But the delivery is slower.
And Verde? It looks more expensive to me.
Yes, Verde is more expensive than Andino. But it is faster, and the quality is higher.
For this client, the deadline is more important than the price. Which one is more reliable?
Verde is the most reliable supplier. So Verde is the best option for this order.
I agree. Let us choose Verde for this client.
Great. I can send the confirmation today. For the next order, we compare again.

Hi team, this is Daniel. I have two coffee suppliers for the new order, and we need to choose the best option. The first supplier, Andino, is cheaper, but the delivery is slower. The second supplier, Verde, is more expensive, but the quality is higher and the shipping is faster. Andino has the lowest price, but Verde is the most reliable. For this important client, faster and better is more useful than cheaper. So my opinion is that Verde is the best choice. Please compare the two offers and tell me what you think. Thank you.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. Thank you for the two offers. I compared them carefully. Andino is cheaper, and the price is the lowest, but the delivery is much slower. Verde is more expensive, but it is faster and the quality is better. For this client, the deadline is more important than the price. The most reliable option is the safest choice. So I agree with you. Verde is the better option, and it is the best one for this order. I can send the confirmation today. Talk soon.

Andino is cheaper than Verde, but Verde is faster. The quality is higher, and it is the most reliable supplier. For this client, faster is more important than cheaper. So Verde is the best option. Let us choose it and compare the next two offers later.
Verde is more expensive than Andino.
Let us compare the two offers.
Verde is the best option for this client.
Verde is the most reliable supplier.
